items.title: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) Stock Drops Despite Market Gains: Important Facts to Note

items.title: Nonstop Health Names Paymon Farazi as Chief Executive Officer to Lead Next Phase of Growth and Innovation
items.description: CONCORD, Calif., September 15, 2025--Nonstop Health announced today that Paymon Farazi has joined the company as its Chief Executive Officer.
